researchTopic: Root-cause synthesis for the system-spec-kit / 026 comprehensive deep-review audit

focus: Doc/schema-to-code drift and governed-ingest metadata loss
noveltyJustification: Established two concrete drift families: public/runtime schema mismatch and validated governance arguments dropped before indexing.

focus: Metadata drift systemic-ness across 026, 027, and audit-control packets
noveltyJustification: Correlated multiple independent review slices showing graph metadata, changelog, status, renumbering, and missing control metadata drift.
Separated bounded stale-routing cache impact from rarer DB/file atomicity split after commit or promotion failure.

focus: P0 security severity calibration under local single-user MCP assumptions
noveltyJustification: Confirmed real scope-bypass primitives but narrowed P0 calibration to shared or multi-tenant trust-boundary deployments.

focus: Deep-loop fan-out blast radius and current-state correction
noveltyJustification: Resolved the last unknown: CLI fan-out is concurrency-capped, but subprocess non-zero exits are still counted as fulfilled pool items and per-lineage iteration settings only size timeout.
